name: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc.
summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. is a global hospitality company that owns, operates, and franchises a portfolio of hotel and resort brands. Its brands include Hilton Hotels & Resorts, Waldorf Astoria Hotels & Resorts, Conrad Hotels & Resorts, Hilton Garden Inn, and Hampton by Hilton, among others. The company operates hotels across various market segments, from luxury to economy, and provides management services to its properties.
